CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.can_edit()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select public.current_profile_role() in ('admin','engineer')
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.can_read()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select public.current_profile_role() in ('admin','engineer','viewer','customer')
$function$

rows.args: p_org uuid, p_email text, p_role app_role, p_actor uuid

p_process_id uuid, p_change_description text, p_changed_pfd boolean, p_changed_pfmea boolean, p_changed_pcp boolean, p_pfmea_row_ids uuid[], p_pcp_row_ids uuid[], p_pfd_node_ids uuid[], p_pfd_edge_ids uuid[]

rows.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.current_profile_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select role::text
  from public.profiles
  where id = auth.uid()
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_detection_effective(p_org uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(level smallint, name text, description text, active boolean, modified_by uuid, modified_by_name text, modified_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select
    d.level,
    coalesce(o.name, d.name) as name,
    coalesce(o.description, d.description) as description,
    coalesce(o.active, d.active) as active,
    o.modified_by,
    nullif(trim(concat(coalesce(p.first_name,''), ' ', coalesce(p.last_name,''))), '') as modified_by_name,
    o.modified_at
  from public.detection_defaults d
  left join public.detection_overrides o
    on o.organization_id = p_org and o.level = d.level
  left join public.profiles p
    on p.id = o.modified_by
  order by d.level asc;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_occurrence_effective(p_org uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(level smallint, name text, description text, active boolean, modified_by uuid, modified_by_name text, modified_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select
    d.level,
    coalesce(o.name, d.name) as name,
    coalesce(o.description, d.description) as description,
    coalesce(o.active, d.active) as active,
    o.modified_by,
    nullif(trim(concat(coalesce(p.first_name,''), ' ', coalesce(p.last_name,''))), '') as modified_by_name,
    o.modified_at
  from public.occurrence_defaults d
  left join public.occurrence_overrides o
    on o.organization_id = p_org and o.level = d.level
  left join public.profiles p
    on p.id = o.modified_by
  order by d.level asc;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_severity_effective(p_org uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(level smallint, name text, description text, active boolean, modified_by uuid, modified_by_name text, modified_at timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select
    d.level,
    coalesce(o.name, d.name) as name,
    coalesce(o.description, d.description) as description,
    coalesce(o.active, d.active) as active,
    o.modified_by,
    nullif(trim(concat(coalesce(p.first_name,''), ' ', coalesce(p.last_name,''))), '') as modified_by_name,
    o.modified_at
  from public.severity_defaults d
  left join public.severity_overrides o
    on o.organization_id = p_org and o.level = d.level
  left join public.profiles p
    on p.id = o.modified_by
  order by d.level asc;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, global_role, active, created_at)
  values (new.id, new.email, 'user', true, now())
  on conflict (id) do nothing;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.has_org_role(org uuid, roles text[])
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.organization_members om
    where om.user_id = auth.uid()
      and om.organization_id = org
      and om.role::text = any(roles)
  );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_admin()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.profiles p
    where p.id = auth.uid()
      and p.global_role = 'admin'
  );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_org_admin_or_champion(p_org uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.organization_members om
    where om.organization_id = p_org
      and om.user_id = auth.uid()
      and om.role in ('admin','champion')
  );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_org_member(org uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.organization_members om
    where om.user_id = auth.uid()
      and om.organization_id = org
  );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_owner_of_edge(edge_id uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists(
    select 1
    from pfd_edges e
    join pfd_nodes ns on ns.id = e.source_node_id
    join operations o on o.id = ns.operation_id
    join projects p on p.id = o.project_id
    where e.id = edge_id and p.user_id = auth.uid()
  );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_owner_of_operation(op_id uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists(
    select 1
    from operations o
    join projects p on p.id = o.project_id
    where o.id = op_id and p.user_id = auth.uid()
  );
$function$
